title: [SV] LowerToHW sets all kinds of nonsense on each sv.assert.* and covers ,etc.
body:
Each operation in a module should not be using an attribute intended for top-level operations to control output location.  setting the output location per-op inside modules doesn't make sense.
```
sv.assert.concurrent  posedge %clock %0 {output_file = {directory = "dir3", exclude_from_filelist = true, exclude_replicated_ops = true, name = "./dir3/filename3"}} : i1
```
